scripts.deploy:api:LOCAL: sam deploy -t cf.household.yaml --config-env household-local && yarn postdeploy --profile losonczil
scripts.deploy:api:CI: export ENV=CI && yarn samconfig && sam deploy -t cf.household.yaml && yarn postdeploy --profile ci
scripts.deploy:web:LOCAL: export ENV=LOCAL && aws s3 sync dist/web_legacy/browser s3://$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name Household-${ENV} --query "Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey=='WebsiteBucket'].OutputValue" --output text --profile losonczil) --profile losonczil
scripts.deploy:web:CI: export ENV=CI && aws s3 sync dist/web_legacy/browser s3://$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name Household-${ENV} --query "Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey=='WebsiteBucket'].OutputValue" --output text --profile ci) --profile ci
scripts.build:hairdressing: rimraf ./dist/hairdressing && cd web && yarn build hairdressing
scripts.deploy:hairdressing:LOCAL: sam deploy -t cf.hairdressing.yaml --config-env hairdressing-web-local && aws s3 sync dist/hairdressing/browser s3://$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name HairdressingWeb-LOCAL --query "Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey=='WebsiteBucket'].OutputValue" --output text --profile losonczil) --profile losonczil
scripts.deploy:hairdressing:DEV: sam deploy -t cf.hairdressing.yaml --config-env hairdressing-web-dev && aws s3 sync dist/hairdressing/browser s3://$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name HairdressingWeb-DEV --query "Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey=='WebsiteBucket'].OutputValue" --output text --profile losonczil) --profile losonczil
